title: Roundtable gap-repair round response
description: One model seat's targeted repair of the open points after seeing every seat's position and the organizer's structured analysis — resolving a contradiction, filling a blind spot, or defending/refuting a unique insight, with evidence. Not re-voting. One round only.

item_responses.description: One entry per open point — contradictions (C#), blind spots (B#), or contested unique insights (U#).

point_id.description: The open point's id: a contradiction 'C1', blind spot 'B1', or unique insight 'U1' (legacy 'D1' also accepted).

position.description: The seat's resolution of this point: which view it now backs / how it fills the gap / whether the insight holds.

agree.description: True if the seat now backs the emerging majority/consensus view on this point.

reasoning.description: Why the seat holds this position, on the merits.

evidence.description: Concrete evidence or argument backing the position (a fact, source, derivation). Empty string if none.

uncertainty.description: What the seat is still unsure about on this point. Empty string if none.

changes_answer.description: True if resolving this point changes the seat's original answer.

confidence.description: The seat's confidence (0-100) in its final positions.
